## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of the issue.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Open the extension popup
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- Chrome version:
- OS:
- Extension version:
- URL (if not sensitive):

## Console output
Any errors from the service worker console (`chrome://extensions/` → inspect service worker) or popup console.
